mapper.select: SELECT B.VERSION, B.MESSAGE_FIELD_ID, B.MESSAGE_FIELD_NAME, B.SORT_ORDER, B.DATA_LENGTH FROM EFIL.TB_EF_IL_MM_MESSAGE A, EFIL.TB_EF_IL_MM_MESSAGE_FIELD B, EFIL.TB_EF_IL_MM_MESSAGE_VERSION C WHERE A.MESSAGE_ID = B.MESSAGE_ID AND A.MESSAGE_ID = C.MESSAGE_ID AND B.VERSION = C.VERSION AND A.LOG_LEVEL = #{logLevel} AND A.MESSAGE_ID = #{messageId} ORDER BY B.SORT_ORDER
mapper.sql:
WHERE 1 = 1
AND H.MESSAGE_SER_NO BETWEEN #{ymdStart} || '0000000000000000000000' AND #{ymdEnd} || '~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~'
AND UPPER(H.CHANNEL_CODE) LIKE '%' || #{channelCode} || '%'
AND H.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{userId} || '%'
AND H.TR_ACNO LIKE '%' || #{trAcno} || '%'
AND H.CUS_NO LIKE '%' || #{cusNo} || '%'
AND H.IN_ACNO LIKE '%' || #{inAcno} || '%'
AND H.IP LIKE '%' || #{ip} || '%'
mapper.select:
SELECT H.TRX_DTIME, H.MESSAGE_SER_NO, H.TRX_TRACKING_NO, H.MESSAGE_ID, H.MESSAGE_NAME, H.USER_ID, H.TR_ACNO, H.IN_ACNO, H.CUS_NO, H.ERROR_CODE, H.IP, H.CHANNEL_CODE, H.SERVICE_ID FROM EFIL.TB_EF_IL_LM_MESSAGE_LOG_T H
ORDER BY H.SERVICE_ID, H.MESSAGE_SER_NO DESC

SELECT A.MESSAGE_SER_NO, A.TRX_TRACKING_NO, A.MESSAGE_ID, A.MESSAGE_NAME, A.CUST_REG_NO, A.USER_ID, A.TRX_DTIME, A.TR_ACNO, A.IN_ACNO, A.SRCH_ACNO, A.IP, A.ERROR_CODE, A.CHANNEL_CODE, B.MESSAGE_HEADER_DATA, B.MESSAGE_BODY_DATA, B.MESSAGE_BODY_DATA2, B.MESSAGE_BODY_DATA3, B.MESSAGE_BODY_DATA4, B.MESSAGE_BODY_DATA5, 'A' AS LOG_LEVEL FROM (SELECT * FROM EFIL.TB_EF_IL_LM_MESSAGE_LOG_T WHERE MESSAGE_SER_NO = #{messageSerNo}) A, (SELECT * FROM EFIL.TB_EF_IL_LM_MESSAGE_LOG_DATA_T WHERE MESSAGE_SER_NO = #{messageSerNo}) B WHERE A.MESSAGE_SER_NO = B.MESSAGE_SER_NO AND A.LOG_DD = B.LOG_DD AND A.MESSAGE_SER_NO = #{messageSerNo}

SELECT H.SVC_ID, M.SVC_NM, SUM(H.NML_PRC_CN) AS NML_PRC_CN, SUM(H.ERR_PRC_CN) AS ERR_PRC_CN, SUM(H.TR_CN) AS TR_CN, SUM(H.PARTNER_CN) AS PARTNER_CN, SUM(H.OS_CN_01) AS OS1, SUM(H.OS_CN_02) AS OS2, SUM(H.OS_CN_03) AS OS3, SUM(H.OS_CN_04) AS OS4, SUM(H.OS_CN_05) AS OS5, SUM(H.OS_CN_06) AS OS6 FROM EFIL.TB_EF_IL_SM_SVC_STT H LEFT OUTER JOIN EFIL.TB_EF_IL_EM_SVC_INF M ON (H.CUS_DS = M.CUS_DS AND H.MED_DS = M.MED_DS AND H.SVC_ID = M.SVC_ID)
AND M.FIRST_REGIST_DTIME >= CAST(#{trYmdStart} AS TIMESTAMP)
AND M.FIRST_REGIST_DTIME <= CAST(#{trYmdEnd} AS TIMESTAMP)
AND H.SVC_ID LIKE UPPER('%' || #{svcId} || '%')
AND H.LOCALE LIKE UPPER('%' || #{locale} || '%')
AND H.MED_DS LIKE UPPER('%' || #{medDs} || '%')
GROUP BY H.SVC_ID, M.SVC_NM

sql.if: AND CREADTED_TIME < CAST(#{trYmdEnd} AS TIMESTAMP) + INTERVAL '1 minute'

mapper.select:
WITH TRXALL AS (
SELECT SERVICE_ID, SERVICE_NAME, APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SUCCESS_YN, SUCCESS_COUNT, FAIL_COUNT, OS1, OS2, OS3, OS4, OS5, OS6 FROM EFBL.TB_EF_BL_SVC WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL SELECT SERVICE_ID, SERVICE_NAME, APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SUCCESS_YN, SUCCESS_COUNT, FAIL_COUNT, OS1, OS2, OS3, OS4, OS5, OS6 FROM EFBL.TB_EF_BL_SVC_D WHERE 1=1
SELECT SERVICE_ID, SERVICE_NAME, APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SUCCESS_YN, SUCCESS_COUNT, FAIL_COUNT, OS1, OS2, OS3, OS4, OS5, OS6 FROM DFSL.TB_DF_SL_SVC WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL SELECT SERVICE_ID, SERVICE_NAME, APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SUCCESS_YN, SUCCESS_COUNT, FAIL_COUNT, OS1, OS2, OS3, OS4, OS5, OS6 FROM DFSL.TB_DF_SL_SVC_D WHERE 1=1
) SELECT TRXALL.SERVICE_ID, TRXALL.SERVICE_NAME, TRXALL.APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, COUNT(TRXALL.SUCCESS_YN) AS SUCCESS_YN, SUM(TRXALL.SUCCESS_COUNT) AS SUCCESS_COUNT, SUM(TRXALL.FAIL_COUNT) AS FAIL_COUNT, SUM(TRXALL.OS1) AS OS1, SUM(TRXALL.OS2) AS OS2, SUM(TRXALL.OS3) AS OS3, SUM(TRXALL.OS4) AS OS4, SUM(TRXALL.OS5) AS OS5, SUM(TRXALL.OS6) AS OS6 FROM TRXALL GROUP BY TRXALL.SERVICE_ID, TRXALL.SERVICE_NAME, TRXALL.APPLICATION_GROUP_ID

sql.if: AND H.TRX_DTIME < CAST(#{trYmdEnd} AS TIMESTAMP) + INTERVAL '1 minute'

choose.when:
WITH TRXALL AS ( SELECT H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_EF_BL_MESSAGE_LOG H WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL SELECT H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG H WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL SELECT H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_EF_DF_MESSAGE_LOG H WHERE 1=1
) SELECT MAX(M.COM_TGRM_VER_NO) as COM_TGRM_VER_NO, TRXALL.CORP, TRXALL.MESSAGE_SER_NO, TRXALL.REQ_RES_TYPE, TRXALL.TRX_TRACKING_NO, TRXALL.USER_ID, TRXALL.CUST_REG_NO, TRXALL.MESSAGE_ID, M.COM_IF_NM, SUBSTRING(CAST(TRXALL.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, TRXALL.ERROR_CODE, TRXALL.LOG_CR_INFO, TRXALL.OS, TRXALL.IP, TRXALL.SCRN_ID, TRXALL.MAC, TRXALL.PROFILE, TRXALL.TEL_NO, TRXALL.TR_ACNO, TRXALL.IN_ACNO FROM TRXALL LEFT OUTER JOIN EFBL.TB_V4_FEP_JOB_INF M ON (M.COM_IF_ID = TRXALL.MESSAGE_ID AND M.COM_LS_UPD_DTM <= TRXALL.TRX_DTIME) GROUP BY TRXALL.CORP, TRXALL.MESSAGE_SER_NO, TRXALL.REQ_RES_TYPE, TRXALL.TRX_TRACKING_NO, TRXALL.USER_ID, TRXALL.CUST_REG_NO, TRXALL.MESSAGE_ID, M.COM_IF_NM, TRXALL.TRX_DTIME, TRXALL.ERROR_CODE, TRXALL.LOG_CR_INFO, TRXALL.OS, TRXALL.IP, TRXALL.SCRN_ID, TRXALL.MAC, TRXALL.PROFILE, TRXALL.TEL_NO, TRXALL.TR_ACNO, TRXALL.IN_ACNO ORDER BY TRXALL.TRX_DTIME DESC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT MAX(M.COM_TGRM_VER_NO) as COM_TGRM_VER_NO, H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,M.COM_IF_NM,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM DFSL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG H LEFT OUTER JOIN DFSL.TB_V4_FEP_JOB_INF M ON (M.COM_IF_ID = H.MESSAGE_ID AND M.COM_LS_UPD_DTM <= H.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY H.CORP_TYPE,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,M.COM_IF_NM,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO ORDER BY H.TRX_DTIME

sql.if: AND H.TRX_DTIME < CAST(#{trYmdEnd} AS TIMESTAMP) + INTERVAL '1 minute'

choose.when:
WITH TRXALL AS (
SELECT H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_EF_BL_MESSAGE_LOG H WHERE 1=1 UNION ALL SELECT H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_EF_BL_MESSAGE_LOG_D H WHERE 1=1
SELECT H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG H WHERE 1=1 UNION ALL SELECT H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG_D H WHERE 1=1
SELECT H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_EF_DF_MESSAGE_LOG H WHERE 1=1 UNION ALL SELECT H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_EF_DF_MESSAGE_LOG_D H WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL SELECT D.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,D.MESSAGE_SER_NO,D.REQ_RES_TYPE,D.TRX_TRACKING_NO,D.USER_ID,D.CUST_REG_NO,D.MESSAGE_ID,D.TRX_DTIME,D.ERROR_CODE,D.LOG_CR_INFO,D.OS,D.IP,D.SCRN_ID,D.MAC,D.PROFILE,D.TEL_NO,D.TR_ACNO,D.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_EF_DF_MESSAGE_LOG D WHERE 1=1 AND D.TRX_DTIME >= CAST(#{trYmdStart} AS TIMESTAMP) AND D.TRX_DTIME < CAST(#{trYmdEnd} AS TIMESTAMP) + INTERVAL '1 minute' AND D.LOG_CR_INFO LIKE UPPER('%' || #{logCrInfo} || '%') AND D.MESSAGE_SER_NO LIKE UPPER('%' || #{messageSerNo} || '%') AND D.USER_ID LIKE UPPER('%' || #{userId} || '%') AND D.CUST_REG_NO LIKE UPPER('%' || #{regCustNo} || '%') AND D.IP LIKE UPPER('%' || #{inIp} || '%') AND D.MESSAGE_ID LIKE UPPER('%' || #{messageId} || '%') AND D.MAC LIKE UPPER('%' || #{mac} || '%') AND D.TR_ACNO LIKE '%' || #{trAcno} || '%' AND D.IN_ACNO LIKE '%' || #{inAcno} || '%' AND D.TEL_NO LIKE '%' || #{telNo} || '%' AND D.SCRN_ID LIKE UPPER('%' || #{scrnId} || '%') UNION ALL SELECT D.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,D.MESSAGE_SER_NO,D.REQ_RES_TYPE,D.TRX_TRACKING_NO,D.USER_ID,D.CUST_REG_NO,D.MESSAGE_ID,D.TRX_DTIME,D.ERROR_CODE,D.LOG_CR_INFO,D.OS,D.IP,D.SCRN_ID,D.MAC,D.PROFILE,D.TEL_NO,D.TR_ACNO,D.IN_ACNO FROM EFBL.TB_EF_DF_MESSAGE_LOG_D D WHERE 1=1 AND D.TRX_DTIME >= CAST(#{trYmdStart} AS TIMESTAMP) AND D.TRX_DTIME < CAST(#{trYmdEnd} AS TIMESTAMP) + INTERVAL '1 minute' AND D.LOG_CR_INFO LIKE UPPER('%' || #{logCrInfo} || '%') AND D.MESSAGE_SER_NO LIKE UPPER('%' || #{messageSerNo} || '%') AND D.USER_ID LIKE UPPER('%' || #{userId} || '%') AND D.CUST_REG_NO LIKE UPPER('%' || #{regCustNo} || '%') AND D.IP LIKE UPPER('%' || #{inIp} || '%') AND D.MESSAGE_ID LIKE UPPER('%' || #{messageId} || '%') AND D.MAC LIKE UPPER('%' || #{mac} || '%') AND D.TR_ACNO LIKE '%' || #{trAcno} || '%' AND D.IN_ACNO LIKE '%' || #{inAcno} || '%' AND D.TEL_NO LIKE '%' || #{telNo} || '%' AND D.SCRN_ID LIKE UPPER('%' || #{scrnId} || '%') ) SELECT MAX(M.COM_TGRM_VER_NO) as COM_TGRM_VER_NO, TRXALL.CORP, TRXALL.MESSAGE_SER_NO, TRXALL.REQ_RES_TYPE, TRXALL.TRX_TRACKING_NO, TRXALL.USER_ID, TRXALL.CUST_REG_NO, TRXALL.MESSAGE_ID, M.COM_IF_NM, SUBSTRING(CAST(TRXALL.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, TRXALL.ERROR_CODE, TRXALL.LOG_CR_INFO, TRXALL.OS, TRXALL.IP, TRXALL.SCRN_ID, TRXALL.MAC, TRXALL.PROFILE, TRXALL.TEL_NO, TRXALL.TR_ACNO, TRXALL.IN_ACNO FROM TRXALL LEFT OUTER JOIN EFBL.TB_V4_FEP_JOB_INF M ON (M.COM_IF_ID = TRXALL.MESSAGE_ID AND M.COM_LS_UPD_DTM <= TRXALL.TRX_DTIME) GROUP BY TRXALL.CORP, TRXALL.MESSAGE_SER_NO, TRXALL.REQ_RES_TYPE, TRXALL.TRX_TRACKING_NO, TRXALL.USER_ID, TRXALL.CUST_REG_NO, TRXALL.MESSAGE_ID, M.COM_IF_NM, TRXALL.TRX_DTIME, TRXALL.ERROR_CODE, TRXALL.LOG_CR_INFO, TRXALL.OS, TRXALL.IP, TRXALL.SCRN_ID, TRXALL.MAC, TRXALL.PROFILE, TRXALL.TEL_NO, TRXALL.TR_ACNO, TRXALL.IN_ACNO ORDER BY TRXALL.TRX_DTIME DESC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT MAX(M.COM_TGRM_VER_NO) as COM_TGRM_VER_NO, H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,M.COM_IF_NM,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM DFSL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG H LEFT OUTER JOIN DFSL.TB_V4_FEP_JOB_INF M ON (M.COM_IF_ID = H.MESSAGE_ID AND M.COM_LS_UPD_DTM <= H.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY H.CORP_TYPE,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,M.COM_IF_NM,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO UNION ALL SELECT MAX(M.COM_TGRM_VER_NO) as COM_TGRM_VER_NO, H.CORP_TYPE AS CORP,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,M.COM_IF_NM,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO FROM DFSL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG_D H LEFT OUTER JOIN DFSL.TB_V4_FEP_JOB_INF M ON (M.COM_IF_ID = H.MESSAGE_ID AND M.COM_LS_UPD_DTM <= H.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1
GROUP BY H.CORP_TYPE,H.MESSAGE_SER_NO,H.REQ_RES_TYPE,H.TRX_TRACKING_NO,H.USER_ID,H.CUST_REG_NO,H.MESSAGE_ID,M.COM_IF_NM,H.TRX_DTIME,H.ERROR_CODE,H.LOG_CR_INFO,H.OS,H.IP,H.SCRN_ID,H.MAC,H.PROFILE,H.TEL_NO,H.TR_ACNO,H.IN_ACNO ORDER BY TRX_DTIME

sql.if: AND H.TRX_DTIME < CAST(#{trYmdEnd} AS TIMESTAMP) + INTERVAL '1 minute'

mapper.select:
SELECT H.MESSAGE_SER_NO, H.REQ_RES_TYPE, SUBSTRING(CAST(H.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, H.TRX_TRACKING_NO, H.MESSAGE_ID, H.USER_ID, H.CUST_REG_NO, H.IP, H.MESSAGE_RES, D.MESSAGE_DATA FROM EFBL.TB_EF_BL_MESSAGE_LOG H LEFT OUTER JOIN EFBL.TB_EF_BL_MESSAGE_LOG_DATA D ON (H.MESSAGE_SER_NO = D.MESSAGE_SER_NO AND H.TRX_TRACKING_NO = D.TRX_TRACKING_NO AND H.TRX_DTIME = D.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1 UNION ALL SELECT H.MESSAGE_SER_NO, H.REQ_RES_TYPE, SUBSTRING(CAST(H.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, H.TRX_TRACKING_NO, H.MESSAGE_ID, H.USER_ID, H.CUST_REG_NO, H.IP, H.MESSAGE_RES, D.MESSAGE_DATA FROM EFBL.TB_EF_BL_MESSAGE_LOG_D H LEFT OUTER JOIN EFBL.TB_EF_BL_MESSAGE_LOG_DATA_D D ON (H.MESSAGE_SER_NO = D.MESSAGE_SER_NO AND H.TRX_TRACKING_NO = D.TRX_TRACKING_NO AND H.TRX_DTIME = D.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1
SELECT H.MESSAGE_SER_NO, H.REQ_RES_TYPE, SUBSTRING(CAST(H.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, H.TRX_TRACKING_NO, H.MESSAGE_ID, H.USER_ID, H.CUST_REG_NO, H.IP, H.MESSAGE_RES, D.MESSAGE_DATA FROM EFBL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG H LEFT OUTER JOIN EFBL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG_DATA D ON (H.MESSAGE_SER_NO = D.MESSAGE_SER_NO AND H.TRX_TRACKING_NO = D.TRX_TRACKING_NO AND H.TRX_DTIME = D.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1 UNION ALL SELECT H.MESSAGE_SER_NO, H.REQ_RES_TYPE, SUBSTRING(CAST(H.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, H.TRX_TRACKING_NO, H.MESSAGE_ID, H.USER_ID, H.CUST_REG_NO, H.IP, H.MESSAGE_RES, D.MESSAGE_DATA FROM EFBL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG_D H LEFT OUTER JOIN EFBL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG_DATA_D D ON (H.MESSAGE_SER_NO = D.MESSAGE_SER_NO AND H.TRX_TRACKING_NO = D.TRX_TRACKING_NO AND H.TRX_DTIME = D.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1
SELECT H.MESSAGE_SER_NO, H.REQ_RES_TYPE, SUBSTRING(CAST(H.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, H.TRX_TRACKING_NO, H.MESSAGE_ID, H.USER_ID, H.CUST_REG_NO, H.IP, H.MESSAGE_RES, D.MESSAGE_DATA FROM EFBL.TB_EF_DF_MESSAGE_LOG H LEFT OUTER JOIN EFBL.TB_EF_DF_MESSAGE_LOG_DATA D ON (H.MESSAGE_SER_NO = D.MESSAGE_SER_NO AND H.TRX_TRACKING_NO = D.TRX_TRACKING_NO AND H.TRX_DTIME = D.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1 and 1=1 UNION ALL SELECT H.MESSAGE_SER_NO, H.REQ_RES_TYPE, SUBSTRING(CAST(H.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, H.TRX_TRACKING_NO, H.MESSAGE_ID, H.USER_ID, H.CUST_REG_NO, H.IP, H.MESSAGE_RES, D.MESSAGE_DATA FROM EFBL.TB_EF_DF_MESSAGE_LOG_D H LEFT OUTER JOIN EFBL.TB_EF_DF_MESSAGE_LOG_DATA_D D ON (H.MESSAGE_SER_NO = D.MESSAGE_SER_NO AND H.TRX_TRACKING_NO = D.TRX_TRACKING_NO AND H.TRX_DTIME = D.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1
SELECT H.MESSAGE_SER_NO, H.REQ_RES_TYPE, SUBSTRING(CAST(H.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, H.TRX_TRACKING_NO, H.MESSAGE_ID, H.USER_ID, H.CUST_REG_NO, H.IP, H.MESSAGE_RES, D.MESSAGE_DATA FROM DFSL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG H LEFT OUTER JOIN DFSL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG_DATA D ON (H.MESSAGE_SER_NO = D.MESSAGE_SER_NO AND H.TRX_TRACKING_NO = D.TRX_TRACKING_NO AND H.TRX_DTIME = D.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1 UNION ALL SELECT H.MESSAGE_SER_NO, H.REQ_RES_TYPE, SUBSTRING(CAST(H.TRX_DTIME AS TEXT),0,20) AS TRX_DTIME, H.TRX_TRACKING_NO, H.MESSAGE_ID, H.USER_ID, H.CUST_REG_NO, H.IP, H.MESSAGE_RES, D.MESSAGE_DATA FROM DFSL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG_D H LEFT OUTER JOIN DFSL.TB_DF_SL_MESSAGE_LOG_DATA_D D ON (H.MESSAGE_SER_NO = D.MESSAGE_SER_NO AND H.TRX_TRACKING_NO = D.TRX_TRACKING_NO AND H.TRX_DTIME = D.TRX_DTIME) WHERE 1=1
LIMIT 1000

SELECT MAX(CHG_DTM) AS CHG_DTM, MAX(REG_DTM) AS REG_DTM, TGRM_SNO, REPR_TGRM_ID, TGRM_NM_ENG, TGRM_NM_KOR, ETC_FRWD_YN1, MSK_PTTRN FROM
EFBL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR DFSL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR
WHERE REPR_TGRM_ID = #{messageId} AND CHG_DTM <= #{trxDtime}::timestamp AND IO_DIS_CD = '100' AND IO_DIS_CD = '400' GROUP BY TGRM_SNO, REPR_TGRM_ID, TGRM_NM_KOR, TGRM_NM_ENG, ETC_FRWD_YN1, MSK_PTTRN

SELECT TGRM_NM_ENG, MAX(CHG_DTM) AS CHG_DTM, MAX(REG_DTM) AS REG_DTM, TGRM_SNO, REPR_TGRM_ID, TGRM_NM_KOR, ETC_FRWD_YN1, MSK_PTTRN FROM
EFBL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR DFSL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR
WHERE REPR_TGRM_ID IN ( SELECT B.TGRM_NM_ENG FROM
EFBL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR B DFSL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR B
WHERE B.REPR_TGRM_ID = #{messageId} AND B.FLD_TYP = 'link' AND B.IO_DIS_CD = '400' ) AND CHG_DTM <= #{trxDtime}::timestamp AND IO_DIS_CD = '100' AND IO_DIS_CD = '400' GROUP BY TGRM_SNO, REPR_TGRM_ID, TGRM_NM_KOR, TGRM_NM_ENG, ETC_FRWD_YN1, MSK_PTTRN

WITH MAX_VER AS ( SELECT MAX(tgrm_ver_no) AS MAX_VER FROM
EFBL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR DFSL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR
WHERE REPR_TGRM_ID = #{messageRes} AND CHG_DTM <= #{trxDtime}::timestamp AND IO_DIS_CD = '100' AND IO_DIS_CD = '400' ) SELECT TGRM_NM_ENG, MAX(CHG_DTM) AS CHG_DTM, MAX(REG_DTM) AS REG_DTM, TGRM_SNO, REPR_TGRM_ID, TGRM_NM_KOR, ETC_FRWD_YN1, MSK_PTTRN FROM
EFBL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR A, MAX_VER B DFSL.TB_V4_INTG_TGRM_SHR A, MAX_VER B
WHERE A.tgrm_ver_no = B.MAX_VER AND A.REPR_TGRM_ID = #{messageRes} AND A.CHG_DTM <= #{trxDtime}::timestamp AND A.IO_DIS_CD = '100' AND A.IO_DIS_CD = '400' GROUP BY A.TGRM_SNO, A.REPR_TGRM_ID, A.TGRM_NM_KOR, A.TGRM_NM_ENG, A.ETC_FRWD_YN1, A.MSK_PTTRN

SELECT APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SEL_GUBUN, DEL_YN, SUM(SUCCESS_COUNT) AS TOTAL_SUCCESS_COUNT, SUM(FAIL_COUNT) AS TOTAL_FAIL_COUNT FROM (
SELECT A.APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, A.SERVICE_ID, B.SEL_GUBUN, B.DEL_YN, A.SUCCESS_COUNT, A.FAIL_COUNT FROM EFBL.TB_EF_BL_SVC A, EFBL.TB_SVC_INFO B WHERE A.SERVICE_ID = B.SERVICE_ID
SELECT A.APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, A.SERVICE_ID, B.SEL_GUBUN, B.DEL_YN, A.SUCCESS_COUNT, A.FAIL_COUNT FROM DFSL.TB_DF_SL_SVC A, DFSL.TB_SVC_INFO B WHERE A.SERVICE_ID = B.SERVICE_ID
) SVC GROUP BY APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SEL_GUBUN, DEL_YN
